title: Value of medal
doc_html:
§1943.  Value of medal

The gold medals shall not cost less than ten dollars nor more than fifty dollars, and the city treasurer shall honor the cost voucher of any medal awarded under this Part when approved by the mayor.
doc_text:
§1943.  Value of medal
The gold medals shall not cost less than ten dollars nor more than fifty dollars, and the city treasurer shall honor the cost voucher of any medal awarded under this Part when approved by the mayor.
